title: Topic intro — on-screen presenter
vo: A short on-screen introduction before the topic begins.
mmd_graphics_notes: Single presenter on screen with a lower-third name strip; gentle fade-in, no other motion.

register_cross_reference.amend_note: AMEND-K1: the on-screen presenter does not match the approved character bank for this PL. Swap to the ratified persona before lock; awaiting SB confirmation of the correct presenter.
register_cross_reference.laila_note: Laila: keep the background plate and lower-third; replace only the presenter render once the approved character is confirmed.
